title: Pomodoro Timer
description: Build a focus timer that uses the Pomodoro technique: 25 min work, 5 min break. Add sound notifications and optional task list.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Fetch weather from a free API and show current conditions plus 5-day forecast. Add search by city and toggle between metric/imperial.

title: Markdown Preview
description: A split-pane editor: type Markdown on the left and see live-rendered HTML on the right. Support headings, lists, code blocks, and links.

title: Quiz App
description: Multiple-choice quiz with a set of questions, score tracking, and a results screen. Load questions from JSON or a simple API.

title: Expense Tracker
description: Add income and expenses with categories and dates. Show a summary and a simple chart (e.g. by category or over time). Persist in localStorage.

title: Todo List with Filters
description: Full CRUD todos with filters: All, Active, Completed. Optional: due dates, priorities, and drag-and-drop reorder.

title: Recipe Finder
description: Search recipes by ingredient or name using a free API (e.g. TheMealDB). Display results with image, ingredients, and instructions.

title: Memory Card Game
description: Flip cards to find matching pairs. Add difficulty levels (grid size), move counter, and a timer.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate random or rule-based color palettes. Allow copying hex codes and optionally export as CSS variables or JSON.

title: GitHub Repo Explorer
description: Search GitHub repos by keyword, show list with stars, language, and description. Link to repo and optionally show recent commits.

title: Typing Speed Test
description: Display a short paragraph; user types it. Measure WPM and accuracy, show results and optional history.

title: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
description: A small app (e.g. a landing page or settings screen) with a theme switcher. Persist preference and respect system preference.

title: Countdown Timer
description: Set a date or duration and show a live countdown. Optional: multiple events and notifications (e.g. browser Notification API).

title: Random Quote Machine
description: Show a random quote (from a local list or API). Add a button to get another and optional 'Tweet' share link.

title: Drawing / Sketch Pad
description: Canvas-based drawing with brush size and color picker. Optional: undo, clear, and save as image.

title: REST Countries Explorer
description: Use the REST Countries API to list countries with search and filter by region. Detail view with borders, languages, and currency.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe with AI
description: Classic tic-tac-toe with an unbeatable minimax opponent. Add board size 3x3 and optional 5x5.

title: Animated Landing Page
description: A single-page landing for a product or event with scroll-triggered animations, smooth sections, and a clear CTA.

title: Password Generator
description: Generate secure passwords with options for length, uppercase, numbers, symbols. Copy to clipboard and show strength meter.

title: Movie Search App
description: Search movies via OMDB or TMDb API. Show poster, rating, year, and plot. Optional: favorites list in localStorage.

title: Real-time Collaborative Whiteboard
description: Multi-user canvas with WebSockets: draw shapes, sticky notes, and cursors. Sync state across clients and support rooms.

title: Unit Converter
description: Convert between units: length, weight, temperature, time. Clean form with instant results and optional history.

title: Snake Game
description: Classic Snake: move with arrow keys, eat food to grow, avoid walls and yourself. Add score and difficulty speed levels.

title: Bookmark Manager
description: Save, tag, and search bookmarks. Folders or tags, export/import, and optional simple search with filters.

title: BMI Calculator
description: Input height and weight, show BMI and a simple healthy-range indicator. Optional: metric/imperial and basic advice.

title: Image Gallery with Lightbox
description: Grid of images (local or from API) with click-to-expand lightbox, prev/next, and optional lazy loading.

title: Stopwatch & Lap Timer
description: Start, pause, reset stopwatch with lap times. Display list of laps and optionally save best lap.

title: Hangman Game
description: Guess the word letter by letter with a limited number of wrong guesses. Use a word list and optional difficulty (word length).

title: News Reader
description: Fetch top headlines from a news API. List with image, title, source, and link. Optional: filter by category or search.

title: Kanban Board
description: Drag-and-drop columns (e.g. To Do, In Progress, Done) with cards. Persist in localStorage and optional add/edit/delete.

title: Currency Converter
description: Convert between currencies using a free exchange-rate API. Input amount and two currencies, show result and optional date picker.

title: Music Player UI
description: Fake or real audio: play/pause, progress bar, volume, playlist. Focus on UI and optional keyboard shortcuts.

title: Breakout / Arkanoid
description: Paddle, ball, and bricks. Bounce physics, levels, lives, and score. Use canvas or DOM with requestAnimationFrame.

title: Chart Dashboard
description: Display data with line, bar, or pie charts (e.g. Chart.js). Load from JSON or API, add filters and tooltips.

title: Infinite Scroll Gallery
description: Load images from an API (e.g. Unsplash) and append more on scroll. Optional: search and lightbox.

title: Flashcard App
description: Create decks and cards, flip to reveal answer, mark known/unknown. Shuffle and optional spaced-repetition hint.

title: Tetris
description: Classic falling blocks: rotate, move, clear lines, level up speed. Use canvas or grid-based DOM.

title: Form Builder Preview
description: Drag form fields (text, select, checkbox) into a canvas and live-preview the resulting form. Export as JSON or HTML.

title: Virtual Drum Kit
description: Click or use keyboard to play drum sounds. Visual feedback and optional record/playback of a short sequence.

title: CSS Gradient Generator
description: Pick colors and stops to build a gradient. Live preview, copy CSS, and optional presets (linear/radial).

title: Word Counter
description: Paste or type text and see word count, character count, and optional reading-time estimate. Simple and fast.

title: Pagination & Table
description: Display tabular data (from JSON or API) with sortable columns, search, and client-side or server-side pagination.
